examples: Written language requires a firm understanding of sequencing and subordination.
There's no ontological subordination of the objects properties to the object itself.
Let me call it, for the purpose here, subordination, or if you wish, the executive function.
One of the great things we have in this country is the tradition of military subordination to civilian leaderships.
Talking about gender-based violence is admitting that violence is deeply rooted in the patriarchal society, which relies on women subordination.
